title: Longshot
description: Upgrade your ranged combat with enhanced projectile velocity! The archer's 'Strength' potion effect
body:
# Longshot
**Unleash the power of [velocity](https://youtu.be/WBiyL1cP91E?t=45)! This dynamic addition introduces a new potion effect that increases the velocity of fired projectiles. With increased velocity, comes increased damage. The ranged counterpart to Strength, it's a must-have for combat and exploration!**

# ✅ Features
- **Increases velocity & damage** on any fired projectiles, i.e. Arrows, Tridents, Firework Rockets and more.
- **Utility uses** exist as well, with Ender Pearls, Fishing Bobbers, and thrown items also reaching further distances than ever before.
- **Brewed with a Nautilus Shell** and an Awkward Potion, but configured to be anything you want!

# 📖 Configuration
Configuration is done through ```config/longshot.json```:
- ```color : "FF664F"``` Color of the potion effect in a [6-digit hexadecimal color or as a color name](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Raw_JSON_text_format#Java_Edition:~:text=color%3A%20Optional.%20Changes,%C2%A0%23FFFFFF).
- ```duration : 3600``` Duration of the normal potion effect in ticks. 
- ```long_duration : 9600``` Duration of the long potion effect in ticks. 
- ```strong_duration : 1800``` Duration of the strong potion effect in ticks. 
- ```ingredient : minecraft:nautilus_shell``` Item that is used as the potion ingredient in the format of a [resource location](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Resource_location).
- ```increase : 0.5``` Velocity increase per amplifier
